page_content:
Prerequisite: ENST200.

Credit Only Granted for. ENST630, ENST430, or NRSC461.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

698 ENST - Environmental Science and Technology

ENST640 Advanced Crops, Soils, and Civilization (3 Credits)

Explore the rise, cycling, resilience, and decline of civilizations and apply learning to modern issues in the fields of sustainability, environmental ethics, natural resource management, and agriculture. Role and importance of crop and soil resources in the development of human civilization. History of crop and soil use and management as they relate to the persistence of ancient and modern cultures.Jointly offered with ENST440.
